mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relay_event_receipt(event_id,request_id,event_type) VALUES(#{eventId},#{requestId},#{eventType}) ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO relay_request_log(request_id,tenant_id,user_id,api_key_id,inbound_protocol,outbound_protocol,endpoint, tenant_model_id,tenant_model_code,route_target_id,provider_channel_id,provider_channel_model_id,stream,request_status, started_at,usage_status,currency_code,price_version,input_price_per_million,output_price_per_million, cache_write_price_per_million,cache_read_price_per_million,pricing_status,source_event_id,created_at,updated_at) VALUES(#{requestId},#{tenantId},#{userId},#{apiKeyId},#{inboundProtocol},#{outboundProtocol},#{endpoint}, #{tenantModelId},#{tenantModelCode},#{routeTargetId},#{providerChannelId},#{providerChannelModelId},#{streaming},'STARTED', #{requestStartedAt},#{usageStatus},#{currencyCode},#{priceVersion},#{inputPricePerMillion},#{outputPricePerMillion}, #{cacheWritePricePerMillion},#{cacheReadPricePerMillion},#{pricingStatus},#{eventId},NOW(),NOW()) ON CONFLICT (request_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO relay_request_log(request_id,tenant_id,user_id,api_key_id,inbound_protocol,outbound_protocol,endpoint, tenant_model_id,tenant_model_code,route_target_id,provider_channel_id,provider_channel_model_id,stream,request_status, error_category,safe_http_status,started_at,finished_at,duration_ms,usage_status,input_tokens,output_tokens, cache_write_tokens,cache_read_tokens,currency_code,price_version,input_price_per_million,output_price_per_million, cache_write_price_per_million,cache_read_price_per_million,theoretical_amount,pricing_status,source_event_id,created_at,updated_at) VALUES(#{event.requestId},#{event.tenantId},#{event.userId},#{event.apiKeyId},#{event.inboundProtocol},#{event.outboundProtocol},#{event.endpoint}, #{event.tenantModelId},#{event.tenantModelCode},#{event.routeTargetId},#{event.providerChannelId},#{event.providerChannelModelId},#{event.streaming},#{event.requestStatus}, #{event.errorCategory},#{event.safeHttpStatus},#{event.requestStartedAt},#{event.requestFinishedAt},#{event.durationMs},#{event.usageStatus},#{event.inputTokens},#{event.outputTokens}, #{event.cacheWriteTokens},#{event.cacheReadTokens},#{event.currencyCode},#{event.priceVersion},#{event.inputPricePerMillion},#{event.outputPricePerMillion}, #{event.cacheWritePricePerMillion},#{event.cacheReadPricePerMillion},#{theoreticalAmount},#{pricingStatus},#{event.eventId},NOW(),NOW()) ON CONFLICT (request_id) DO UPDATE SET request_status=EXCLUDED.request_status,error_category=EXCLUDED.error_category,safe_http_status=EXCLUDED.safe_http_status, finished_at=EXCLUDED.finished_at,duration_ms=EXCLUDED.duration_ms,usage_status=EXCLUDED.usage_status, input_tokens=EXCLUDED.input_tokens,output_tokens=EXCLUDED.output_tokens,cache_write_tokens=EXCLUDED.cache_write_tokens, cache_read_tokens=EXCLUDED.cache_read_tokens,theoretical_amount=EXCLUDED.theoretical_amount, pricing_status=EXCLUDED.pricing_status,source_event_id=EXCLUDED.source_event_id,updated_at=NOW() WHERE relay_request_log.request_status='STARTED'
mapper.select: SELECT request_id AS requestId,tenant_model_code AS tenantModelCode,inbound_protocol AS inboundProtocol,stream, request_status AS requestStatus,duration_ms AS durationMs,input_tokens AS inputTokens,output_tokens AS outputTokens, cache_write_tokens AS cacheWriteTokens,cache_read_tokens AS cacheReadTokens,usage_status AS usageStatus, theoretical_amount AS theoreticalAmount,pricing_status AS pricingStatus,started_at AS startedAt FROM relay_request_log ORDER BY started_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT request_id AS requestId,tenant_model_code AS tenantModelCode,inbound_protocol AS inboundProtocol, outbound_protocol AS outboundProtocol,endpoint,stream,request_status AS requestStatus,error_category AS errorCategory, safe_http_status AS safeHttpStatus,started_at AS startedAt,finished_at AS finishedAt,duration_ms AS durationMs, input_tokens AS inputTokens,output_tokens AS outputTokens,cache_write_tokens AS cacheWriteTokens, cache_read_tokens AS cacheReadTokens,usage_status AS usageStatus,currency_code AS currencyCode,price_version AS priceVersion, input_price_per_million AS inputPricePerMillion,output_price_per_million AS outputPricePerMillion, cache_write_price_per_million AS cacheWritePricePerMillion,cache_read_price_per_million AS cacheReadPricePerMillion, theoretical_amount AS theoreticalAmount,pricing_status AS pricingStatus FROM relay_request_log WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE request_status='SUCCESS') AS success, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE request_status='FAILED') AS failed,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE request_status='CANCELLED') AS cancelled, SUM(input_tokens) AS inputTokens,SUM(output_tokens) AS outputTokens,SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cacheWriteTokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cacheReadTokens,SUM(theoretical_amount) FILTER (WHERE pricing_status='CALCULATED') AS theoreticalAmount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE usage_status='UNKNOWN') AS usageUnknown,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE usage_status='PARTIAL') AS usagePartial, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pricing_status='UNAVAILABLE') AS pricingUnavailable,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pricing_status='PARTIAL') AS pricingPartial FROM relay_request_log

SELECT date_trunc('${bucketUnit}', started_at AT TIME ZONE #{timeZone}) AS bucketStart,COUNT(*) AS requestCount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE request_status='SUCCESS') AS successCount,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE request_status='FAILED') AS failedCount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE request_status='CANCELLED') AS cancelledCount,SUM(input_tokens) AS inputTokens,SUM(output_tokens) AS outputTokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cacheWriteTokens,SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cacheReadTokens, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE input_tokens IS NOT NULL)=0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE input_tokens IS NOT NULL)=COUNT(*) THEN 'REPORTED' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END AS inputTokensDataStatus, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE output_tokens IS NOT NULL)=0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE output_tokens IS NOT NULL)=COUNT(*) THEN 'REPORTED' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END AS outputTokensDataStatus, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cache_write_tokens IS NOT NULL)=0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cache_write_tokens IS NOT NULL)=COUNT(*) THEN 'REPORTED' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END AS cacheWriteTokensDataStatus, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cache_read_tokens IS NOT NULL)=0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cache_read_tokens IS NOT NULL)=COUNT(*) THEN 'REPORTED' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END AS cacheReadTokensDataStatus, SUM(theoretical_amount) FILTER (WHERE pricing_status='CALCULATED') AS calculatedTheoreticalAmount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pricing_status='CALCULATED')=0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pricing_status='CALCULATED')=COUNT(*) THEN 'CALCULATED' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END AS pricingDataStatus FROM relay_request_log GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY bucketStart
